posts.title: Building Reliable LLM Pipelines with Structured Output and Validation
posts.excerpt: A practical guide to extracting reliable, typed structured output from LLMs using constrained decoding, schema validation, and retry strategies — moving from fragile prompt hacks to production-grade pipelines.

posts.title: Code Generation LLMs: Benchmark Analysis
posts.excerpt: A comprehensive guide to Code Generation LLMs: Benchmark Analysis. Learn the fundamentals, best practices, and practical implementations for modern software development.

posts.title: Building a Simple Chatbot with OpenRouter API
posts.excerpt: A practical guide to creating a chatbot using OpenRouter's unified API. Learn how to integrate multiple LLM providers, handle conversations, and deploy your AI assistant.

posts.title: Emphasizing Good LLM Models for Local Development
posts.excerpt: Discover how to leverage powerful open-source LLMs like Llama, Mistral, and Qwen for local development. Learn about quantization, model selection, and building privacy-first AI applications.

posts.title: Fundamentals of Good Programming Practices
posts.excerpt: Explore the core principles that separate amateur code from professional-grade software. Learn about clean code, SOLID principles, and testing strategies that will elevate your development skills.
